mapper.select: SELECT CONCAT(UPPER(#{typePrefix}), '-', T1.company_cd, '-', T1.curr_date, '-', T1.next_seq) AS docNo FROM ( SELECT IFNULL((SELECT company_cd FROM TB_USERS WHERE user_id = #{userId}), 'GFT') AS company_cd, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d') AS curr_date, LPAD( IFNULL( (SELECT MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(doc_no, '-', -1) AS UNSIGNED)) FROM TB_DOCUMENT_MST WHERE reg_dtime >= CURDATE() AND doc_no LIKE CONCAT(UPPER(#{typePrefix}), '-%') ), 0) + 1, 3, '0' ) AS next_seq ) T1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_DOCUMENT_MST ( doc_no, doc_title, doc_type, order_id, owner_user_id, doc_content, total_amt, due_date, reg_id ) VALUES ( #{docNo}, #{docTitle}, #{docType}, #{orderId}, #{ownerUserId}, #{docContent}, #{totalAmt}, #{dueDate}, #{regId} )
mapper.select: SELECT d.doc_id, d.doc_no, d.doc_type, IFNULL(d.memo, '') AS memo, d.reg_dtime, o.order_id, o.order_no, o.order_status, c.cart_id, c.total_qty, c.total_price, c.fuel_id, f.fuel_nm, u.user_name FROM TB_DOCUMENT_MST d LEFT JOIN TB_ORDER_MST o ON d.order_id = o.order_id LEFT JOIN TB_CART c ON o.order_no = c.order_no LEFT JOIN TB_OIL_MST f ON c.fuel_id = f.fuel_id LEFT JOIN TB_USERS u ON d.owner_user_id = u.user_id WHERE d.doc_id = #{docId} ORDER BY d.doc_id DESC

SELECT d.doc_id, d.doc_no, d.doc_title, d.doc_type, IFNULL(d.memo, '') AS memo, d.reg_dtime, u.user_name FROM TB_DOCUMENT_MST d LEFT JOIN TB_USERS u ON d.owner_user_id = u.user_id
AND doc_type = #{docType}
AND ( d.doc_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.user_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY d.doc_id DESC
